draft.description: Free agent for rough drafts, brainstorming, and iterative exploration. No code edits — pure thinking and conversation only.

plan.description: Deep reasoning for architecture, planning, and complex analysis using Kimi 2.7. No code edits — thinking only.

build.description: Implementation agent that edits files, runs commands, builds features, and handles deployments. Can delegate read-only research to @explore subagent.

explore.description: Read-only codebase researcher. Finds files, searches patterns, and answers questions about existing code. No edits.

expensive-planner.description: Premium reasoning agent for the hardest architecture, strategy, and design problems. No code edits — deep thinking only.
